tools.name: add_contact
tools.description: Add a new contact person to contact database. Entries with identical information are allowed, and will be assigned different person_ids.

relationship.description: Optional, relationship between user and this contact

is_self.description: Optional. Defaults to False. Should be set to True if the contact corresponds to the current user.

output.description: String format unique identifier for the contact person, this can be passed to other functions which require a unique identifier for this contact person

tools.name: modify_contact
tools.description: Modify a contact entry with new information provided

person_id.description: String unique identifier for the contact person

phone_number.description: New phone number for the person

is_self.description: Optional. Defaults to False. Should be set to True if the contact corresponds to the current user.

output.description: No return value

tools.name: remove_contact
tools.description: Remove an existing contact person from contact database.

person_id.description: String format unique identifier of the person to be deleted

output.description: No return value

tools.name: search_contacts
tools.description: Search for a contact person based on provided arguments. Each field has a search criteria of either exact value matching or fuzzy string matching with a predefined threshold.

person_id.description: String format unique identifier for the contact person, will be exact matched

name.description: Name of contact person, will be fuzzy matched

phone_number.description: Phone number of contact person, will be exact matched

relationship.description: Relationship between user and this contact, will be fuzzy matched

is_self.description: If the requested contact corresponds to the current user. Will be exact matched

output.description: A List of matching contacts. An empty List if no matching contacts were found

tools.name: send_message_with_phone_number
tools.description: Send a message to a recipient using phone_number

phone_number.description: String format phone number to send the message to

output.description: String format unique identifier for the message, this can be passed to other functions which require a unique identifier for this message

tools.name: search_messages
tools.description: Search for a message based on provided arguments. Each field has a search criteria of exact value matching, fuzzy string matching with a predefined threshold, or range matching timestamp with upperbound or lowerbound.

message_id.description: String format unique identifier for message, will be exact matched

sender_person_id.description: String format unique identifier for the sender, will be exact matched

sender_phone_number.description: Phone number for the sender, will be exact matched

recipient_person_id.description: String format unique identifier for the recipient, will be exact matched

recipient_phone_number.description: Phone number for the recipient, will be exact matched

content.description: Message content, will be fuzzy matched

creation_timestamp_lowerbound.description: Lowerbound of the POSIX timestamp of the time the message is created

creation_timestamp_upperbound.description: Upperbound of the POSIX timestamp of the time the message is created

output.description: A List of matching messages. An empty List if no matching contacts were found

tools.name: search_lat_lon
tools.description: Search for the address corresponding to a latitude and longitude

output.description: Address string if the address can be found, otherwise return None

tools.name: search_location_around_lat_lon
tools.description: Search for a location around a latitude and longitude. Location is a surface form query defining the location (business name, point of interest, city/state, or full address). When latitude and longitude are not provided, defaults to search around current location.

location.description: Surface form query defining the location

latitude.description: Latitude to search around. Defaults to current latitude if not provided

longitude.description: Longitude to search around. Defaults to current longitude if not provided

output.description: A List of dictionary containing various information about the location if found, otherwise return empty list

tools.name: search_weather_around_lat_lon
tools.description: Search for weather information around a latitude and longitude, right now or sometime in the future. Search results contains weather forecast information including condition, temperature, humidity, country, state, timezone.

days.description: Number of days to search for past the current time. Defaults to current day if not provided.

latitude.description: Latitude to search around. Defaults to current latitude if not provided

longitude.description: Longitude to search around. Defaults to current longitude if not provided

output.description: A dictionary containing weather forecast information if found, otherwise return None

tools.name: search_stock
tools.description: Search for various information about a stock given a query. The query can be a company name (Apple), stock symbol (AAPL) or exchange name (NASDAQ).

query.description: A company name (Apple), stock symbol (AAPL) exchange name (NASDAQ)

output.description: A dictionary containing various optional information about the stock if found, otherwise return None

name.description: The written name of the stock, e.g. Apple

symbol.description: The code for the stock, e.g. AAPL

exchange.description: The exchange the stock is in, e.g. NASDAQ

change.description: Absolute diff between current price of the stock and last opening day

percent_change.description: Relative diff between current price of the stock and last opening day

currency.description: ISO currency of the currency this stock trades in, e.g. USD

tools.name: convert_currency
tools.description: Converts currency amount from one currency to another given their ISO 4217 currency codes

from_currency_code.description: ISO 4217 currency code amount corresponds to

to_currency_code.description: ISO 4217 currency code return value corresponds to

output.description: A float amount in to_currency_code

tools.name: add_reminder
tools.description: Add a reminder

reminder_timestamp.description: When the user wants to be reminded. Expressed in POSIX timestamp

latitude.description: Optional. Latitude of the location associated with this reminder

longitude.description: Optional. Longitude of the location associated with this reminder

output.description: String format unique identifier for the reminder, this can be passed to other functions which require a unique identifier for this reminder

tools.name: modify_reminder
tools.description: Modify a reminder with new information provided. Creation timestamp is updated automatically.

reminder_id.description: String format unique identifier of the reminder to be modified

reminder_timestamp.description: When the user wants to be reminded. Expressed in POSIX timestamp

latitude.description: Optional. Latitude of the location associated with this reminder

longitude.description: Optional. Longitude of the location associated with this reminder

output.description: No return value

tools.name: search_reminder
tools.description: Search for a reminder based on provided arguments. Each field has a search criteria of exact value matching, fuzzy string matching with a predefined threshold, or range matching timestamp with upperbound or lowerbound.

reminder_id.description: String format unique identifier for the reminder person, will be exact matched

content.description: Content of the reminder, will be fuzzy matched

creation_timestamp_lowerbound.description: Lowerbound of the POSIX timestamp of the time the reminder is created

creation_timestamp_upperbound.description: Upperbound of the POSIX timestamp of the time the reminder is created

reminder_timestamp_lowerbound.description: Lowerbound of the POSIX timestamp of the time the reminder should be reminded

reminder_timestamp_upperbound.description: Upperbound of the POSIX timestamp of the time the reminder should be reminded

latitude.description: Latitude of the location associated with the reminder. Will be exact matched.

longitude.description: Longitude of the location associated with the reminder. Will be exact matched.

output.description: A List of matching reminders. An empty List if no matching contacts were found

tools.name: remove_reminder
tools.description: Remove a reminder given its unique identifier

reminder_id.description: String format unique identifier of the reminder to be removed

output.description: No return value

tools.name: set_low_battery_mode_status
tools.description: Enable / Disable low battery mode. Automatically turns off dependent services (cellular, wifi, location_service) when enabled.

on.description: If we want to turn on low battery mode

output.description: No return value

tools.name: get_low_battery_mode_status
tools.description: Request low battery mode status

output.description: Boolean indicating if the low battery mode is on

tools.name: set_location_service_status
tools.description: Enable / Disable location service. Cannot be turned on when low battery mode is enabled.

on.description: If we want to turn on location service

output.description: No return value

tools.name: get_location_service_status
tools.description: Request location service status

output.description: Boolean indicating if the location service is on

tools.name: set_cellular_service_status
tools.description: Enable / Disable cellular service. Cannot be turned on when low battery mode is enabled.

on.description: If we want to turn on cellular service

output.description: No return value

tools.name: get_cellular_service_status
tools.description: Request cellular service status

output.description: Boolean indicating if the cellular service is on

tools.name: set_wifi_status
tools.description: Enable / Disable wifi. Cannot be turned on when low battery mode is enabled.

on.description: If we want to turn on wifi

output.description: No return value

tools.name: get_wifi_status
tools.description: Request wifi status

output.description: Boolean indicating if the wifi is on

tools.name: get_current_location
tools.description: Request current location latitude and longitude. Requires location service to be enabled.

output.description: A dictionary of latitude and longitude

tools.name: get_current_timestamp
tools.description: Get current POSIX timestamp

output.description: Float value POSIX timestamp

tools.name: timestamp_to_datetime_info
tools.description: Convert POSIX timestamp to a dictionary of date time information, including year, month, day, hour, minute, second, isoweekday (ranges from 1-7)

output.description: A dictionary of current date time information

tools.name: datetime_info_to_timestamp
tools.description: Convert date time information to POSIX timestamp

output.description: POSIX timestamp

tools.name: shift_timestamp
tools.description: Shifts a POSIX timestamp by provided deltas. Delta can be positive or negative.

weeks.description: Number of weeks to add or subtract

days.description: Number of days to add or subtract

hours.description: Number of hours to add or subtract

minutes.description: Number of minutes to add or subtract

seconds.description: Number of seconds to add or subtract

output.description: A shifted POSIX timestamp with deltas applied

tools.name: timestamp_diff
tools.description: Calculates the difference between two timestamps (timestamp_1 - timestamp_0), return the difference represented in days and seconds

output.description: A dictionary containing the difference between timestamp in days and seconds

tools.name: seconds_to_hours_minutes_seconds
tools.description: Convert total number of seconds past 0:00 into hours, minutes and seconds

output.description: A dictionary of hours, minutes and seconds

tools.name: unit_conversion
tools.description: Convert a certain amount from one unit to another. You can use common english names to represent the from and to units.

from_unit.description: Unit to convert from. For example celsius

to_unit.description: Unit to convert to. For example fahrenheit

output.description: Converted amount

tools.name: calculate_lat_lon_distance
tools.description: Calculate the distance between 2 pairs of latitude and longitude

output.description: Distance between the 2 pairs in kilometer

tools.name: search_holiday
tools.description: Search for a holiday by name in the US. Canonicalize return value into corresponding POSIX timestamp.

holiday_name.description: Name of the holiday in surface form string

year.description: Optional. Year to search the holiday in. When not provided defaults to current year.

output.description: POSIX timestamp of holiday if the holiday can be found, otherwise return None
